github-actions.comment: Actions are pinned to @main (float on upstream default branch, no version pinning) — so disable Renovate's github-actions manager; it would otherwise pin @main to a commit SHA.

packageRules.description: Keep log4j artifacts version-aligned. Only log4j-core published 3.0.0-beta3; log4j-api and log4j-slf4j2-impl cap at beta2 on Central, so an independent core bump to beta3 yields NoSuchMethodError ServiceLoaderUtil.safeStream at runtime. Skip the orphan beta3 until api/slf4j2-impl catch up.

Block the stray Kotlin-prefixed moshix version. 1.7.20-Beta-0.18.3 = Kotlin 1.7.20-Beta + moshix 0.18.3 from the old coupled scheme; it sorts above the decoupled 0.x releases, so Renovate keeps proposing it. Exclude just that version and let Renovate pick the highest of the rest.
